\tzpentry{ID4565}{Opera Omnia Vol Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4565 introduces Opera Omnia Vol Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P = \int_{\mathcal{S}} (T^{\mu\nu}u_{\nu}) \cdot d\vec{A} \implies P_{\text{max}} \sim \frac{\hbar c^2}{a^2} \end{equation}
